calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Small Claims Appeal and Trial De Novo. filed by Defendant/Appellant Alba Abrca.

Dept. 306; Judge: Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:58:03 a.m. and concluding at 10:44:30 a.m.

Defendant/Appellant Alba Abarca appearing in pro per.
Defendant/Appellant is assisted by a Spanish Language Interpreter, Certification #301545.
Plaintiff/Respondent Maritza Tronoff appearing in pro per.

ALBA ABARCA IS SWORN TO TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF HERSELF.
MARITZA TRONOFF IS SWORN TO TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF HERSELF.

Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - 8 Page Combination of Bills and Papers from Recology/Containing Notice #1230014 dated Aug-26-2024 and Notice #1234497 dated Sep-26-2024

Appellant/Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - Photograph of Computer Screen/Proof of Payment

The matter is submitted.
At the conclusion of the hearing, previous judgment is REVERSED.
JUDGMENT IS ORDERED in favor of Defendant/Appelant Alba Abarca and against Maritza Tronoff in the amount of $0.

The judgment on appeal is final and replaces the small claims judgment of Nov-14-2024.
Exhibits are ordered returned pursuant to CCP 1952. The case is remanded to Small Claims Court.
